description: CompositionPink socks made of 100% cotton, with mauve border at the ankle and brand name knitted on the forefootWash care Machine wash warm in not more than 40 degrees Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not use softeners Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Do not iron Guaranteed to stay soft and cushioned after multiple washes, these socks from wrangler are ideal wear with sneakers or floaters. The elastic is suited to sit snug on your ankle and make you feel comfortable all day while the forefoot can be stretched enough to Fit the widest of feet. Add style to your attire with these socks and feel free to step in comfort.
